description: Create a new permissioned space under an arbiter. The authenticated user must have CreateSpaces access (typically from the $admin space).

arbiterDid.description: DID of the arbiter that will manage the space.

spaceKey.description: Key for the new space. Must not already exist.

resolverDepth.description: Maximum depth for resolving remote space members. Defaults to 3.

errors.name: ArbiterNotExists
errors.description: No arbiter with this DID exists.

errors.name: SpaceAlreadyExists
errors.description: A space with this key already exists.

errors.name: PermissionDenied
errors.description: The user does not have CreateSpaces access.

errors.name: PermissionChanged
errors.description: The arbiter state changed since the request was submitted.
